skills.name: china-trip-planner
skills.description: Free personalized China travel checklist. Answer 5 questions (nationality, arrival date, trip length, priorities, laptop needs) and get a complete pre-departure countdown: visa requirements, eSIM recommendation with pricing, payment setup, offline maps, VPN advice, and food delivery tips. All recommendations based on real test data from 6 eSIM providers across Beijing, Shanghai, and Shenzhen.

skills.name: china-esim-comparison
skills.description: Independent test results comparing 6 eSIM providers for China travel. Includes firewall bypass status, 5G support, hotspot sharing, and pricing. Updated with real speed tests from May 2026.
